23 Building Blocks
Clickfunnels Training Part 1 - Elements
Elements are the building blocks to pages and pages are the building blocks to
funnels. In part one we will go over all of the 23 element types.
14 Day Trial Of ClickFunnels.
Pro tip: Get Funnels Scripts so you can just answer questions instead of having to
write copy on the pages you're going to be creating with the 'text' elements.
